zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Josselyn於1275年12月13日出生在英國艾可謝洛福 包維爾斯時，他的父親Thomas Josselyn27歲，母親Alice Liston23歲。他於大約1310年與Ann Sandys在英國英格蘭艾可維林加爾聖 可利斯托福黑也斯 邱奇結婚。他去世於1323年在英國英格蘭享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可維林加爾 多。

nameMeanings.name: Josselyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Suffolk and Essex): variant of   Joslin  .

History: The Josselyn name appears in Black Point (now Scarborough, ME) before 1638, when the author John Josselyn came to visit his brother Henry, who was for many years a principal representative in eastern New England of the interests of the Mason and Gorges heirs, which were endangered by the Massachusetts Bay colony's expansion into Maine. Their father was Sir Thomas Josselyn, of Torrell's Hall in Willingale, Essex, England.

variants.name: Joslin
meanings: from the Old French personal name Goscelin, Gosselin, Joscelin, from ancient Germanic Goz(e)lin, a diminutive of a short form of compound names based on the element goz (from gaut, an ethnic name meaning ‘Geat’ or ‘Goth’; see Goss ).
alternatively, perhaps a diminutive of the Old French personal name Josse (Old Breton Judoc); see Joyce .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Josselyn was born on 13 December 1275, in Shellow Bowells, Essex, England, his father, Thomas Josselyn, was 27 and his mother, Alice Liston, was 23. He married Ann Sandys about 1310, in St Christopher's Church, Willingale, Essex, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1323, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Willingale Doe, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Josselyn(이)가 1275년 12월 13일 영국 에세스 셸로 보월스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Josselyn(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Liston(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 윌링일 스트 크리스토퍼'스 c후르치에서 Ann Sandys(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1323년 영국 잉글랜드에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 윌링일 도에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Josselyn родился 13 декабря 1275 г. в местности шеллоу боуеллс, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Josselyn было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Liston, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Sandys около 1310 г. в местности ст кристофир'с чурч, уиллингеил, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1323 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности уиллингеил до, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
